step_rationale: Epoxyeicosatetraenoic acids from EPA; anti-inflammatory specialized mediators.
mechanism: EEQs dampen pro-inflammatory cytokine signaling and platelet function, reducing atherothrombotic progression.

references.title: Omega-3 polyunsaturated fatty acid supplementation improves lipid metabolism and endothelial function by providing a beneficial eicosanoid-pattern in patients with acute myocardial infarction: A randomized, controlled trial.
